description: Fraudsters lure victims with fake job offers, work-from-home opportunities, or high-paying employment to steal money, personal information, or banking credentials.
recommended_actions: Verify job offers through the company's official website.
Never pay registration, interview, or security fees for a job.
Do not share banking credentials or OTPs with recruiters.
Report the fraud immediately by calling 1930.
Preserve emails, chats, offer letters, payment receipts, and call records.

rules.name: Work From Home Offer
rules.explanation: Promises easy work-from-home jobs with high income.
examples: Earn ₹5,000 daily from home.
Work only 2 hours a day and earn ₹50,000/month.

rules.name: Registration Fee
examples: Pay ₹999 to confirm your interview.
Registration fee is mandatory before joining.

rules.name: Data Entry Scam
rules.explanation: Offers fake data entry or typing jobs that later demand money.
examples: Earn ₹30,000 by filling forms.
Simple typing work with weekly payment.

rules.name: Telegram/WhatsApp Job
rules.explanation: Recruitment conducted only through Telegram or WhatsApp.
examples: Join our Telegram channel for work.
Complete tasks on WhatsApp to earn money.

rules.name: Fake HR Recruiter
rules.explanation: Impersonates HR personnel from reputed companies.
examples: I am HR from TCS.
Congratulations! You have been shortlisted.

rules.name: Fake Offer Letter
rules.explanation: Sends forged offer letters to gain trust.
examples: Download your appointment letter.
Your joining letter is attached.

rules.name: Security Deposit
examples: Pay ₹5,000 as a refundable security deposit.
Training fee is required before onboarding.

rules.name: Task Based Earnings
rules.explanation: Promises income for completing online tasks before demanding investments.
examples: Like YouTube videos and earn ₹500.
Complete Google review tasks for commission.

rules.name: International Placement
rules.explanation: Offers overseas jobs after collecting advance fees.
examples: Guaranteed Canada job after visa payment.
Dubai placement available immediately.

rules.name: Government Job Scam
rules.explanation: Claims guaranteed selection in government recruitment.
examples: Guaranteed railway job after payment.
Secure a police job without examination.
